items.title: SmartSens, Unisoc team up on Micro LED optical interconnects for AI computing
items.summary: Chinese CMOS image sensor supplier SmartSens Technology announced on May 26 that it has entered into a strategic partnership with Chinese IC design company Unisoc to jointly develop Micro LED-based high-speed optical interconnect technology, targeting applications in AI computing clusters, smart vehicles, and industrial vision.

items.title: Taiwan's Panel maker TPK bets on UK energy storage boom with Sumitomo and GRID tie-up
items.summary: TPK Holding, a Taiwan-based touch panel manufacturer facing weakening demand in its core business, has been pivoting aggressively into new growth areas in 2026 — from semiconductor packaging to, now, clean energy infrastructure. The company's latest move takes it to Europe.

items.title: Lenovo redesigns ThinkPad and shifts to services as component inflation squeezes PC market
items.summary: Lenovo is pursuing a "dual-down" strategy to capture market share as rising memory prices and CPU shortages squeeze PC makers, shifting from hardware supplier to a technology solutions provider that works more closely with customers. Yasumichi Tsukamoto, vice president of R&D for commercial devices and intelligent solutions, said component inflation is forcing the change.

items.title: Nvidia CEO says Huawei's Tau Scaling Law not a threat to TSMC
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang gave a media interview after the "trillion-dollar dinner" in Taipei, Taiwan, on May 28, commenting on topics including competition in the artificial intelligence (AI) industry, cloud service providers (CSP) developing in-house application-specific integrated circuits (ASIC), Huawei's technological progress, Taiwan's role as a center of the AI revolution, and energy demand.

items.title: 每日椽真：晶片小偷之說可休矣 | 台股市值再次超車的背後？ | 矽谷直擊Plug and Play新創峰會五大趨勢
items.summary: NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳於5月28日再度於磚窯餐廳舉辦「兆元宴」，多位台灣AI伺服器與半導體供應鏈董事長、總經理陸續現身及進行合影。除了台積電董事長魏哲家、廣達董事長林百里等7位大咖坐在首排外，2026年2月接下欣興董事長大位的前聯電共同總經理簡山傑首度代表欣興出席，成為亮點之一。NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳於兆元宴後接受媒體

items.title: BIOSTAR映泰強勢布局NVIDIA邊緣AI與NPU生態系
items.summary: BIOSTAR映泰將於2026 COMPUTEX台北國際電腦展，展現邊緣AI策略與產品的全面進化！除了深耕智慧製造、零售與城市等領域，2026年更將應用大舉拓展至 VLM、VSS及當前最受矚目的代理式AI（Agentic

items.title: 華邦電「三倍價」AI矽電容拚出貨　三星電機長單2027放量
items.summary: AI帶動高效能晶片需求日益漸高，三星電機（Semco）日前宣布取得北美科技大廠的半導體矽電容（Silicon Capacitor；Si-

items.title: 聯發科、高通ASIC為何受青睞？　先進製程、封裝產能取得能力成關鍵
items.summary: 有鑒於先進製程、先進封裝，甚或是零組件的供應情況都愈來愈吃緊，雲端服務（CSP）大廠的特用晶片（ASIC）基本上已經處於需求無虞，但欠缺產能的大環境。因此，除了設計服務的技術能力之外，能不能夠在產能，甚至整個供應鏈的整合上面，幫CSP大廠搞定一切，顯然也成為是否能夠在ASIC市場中佔有一席之地的關鍵因素。熟悉ASI

items.title: 三星勞資退一步股票發獎金　半導體業新模式掀企業慎思
items.summary: 三星電子（Samsung Electronics）以股票為基礎的績效獎勵模式已通過最終關卡，勞資雙方日前各退一步達成的協議方案，規劃大規模的庫藏股績效獎勵模式，獲得73.7%的工會成員投票同意。對於三星或南韓而言，罷工局面雖暫時化解，但也對南韓社會留下不少課題。韓媒ET

items.title: SDC 8.6代OLED單月衝破90%黃金良率　 MacBook面板量產倒數
items.summary: 在蘋果（Apple）MacBook Pro用面板供貨時程將至之際，三星顯示器（Samsung Display；SDC）OLED量產穩定化的進度正明顯加快。近日有消息傳出，SDC已將8.6代IT用OLED良率提升至90%以上，部分製程良率更達到95%，創下「黃金良率」紀錄。據韓媒Theelec引述業界消息，SDC的8.

items.title: Sam Altman：澳洲應成為全球「資料中心首都」
items.summary: OpenAI執行長Sam Altman表示，澳洲能夠且應該成爲世界資料中心首都。根據澳洲富比士（Forbes Australia）報導，Altman以視訊的方式參與澳洲聯邦銀行（Commonwealth

items.title: SpaceX坦承AI晶片嚴重短缺　Terafab成軌道AI豪賭關鍵
items.summary: 太空探索公司SpaceX在準備首次公開上市（IPO）的Form S-1文件中首度坦承，若要全面推進Elon Musk的軌道AI運算（Orbital AI Compute）願景，所需的AI晶片和運算硬體數量，將遠遠超過目前市場可供給規模，凸顯全球AI晶片荒將由地面資料中心蔓延至太空運算領域。根據Tom’s

items.title: Marvell雲端AI網通基建迎爆發期　ASIC業務前景預估不變
items.summary: 邁威爾（Marvell）公布2027會計年度第1季財報後，外界最關注的，依舊是其特用晶片（ASIC）業務發展狀況，畢竟近期市場訊息，皆顯示Marvell在ASIC的新業務上並無顯著斬獲。而Marvell對此的論調，主要強調既定的成長動能不會改變，現在取得與鎖定的專案都會穩定落地，包括2027財務年度營收成長目標2成，2028財

items.title: 博通轉攻南韓IC設計　FuriosaAI簽約後Rebellions、DEEPX評估中
items.summary: 在博通（Broadcom）與南韓IC設計新創FuriosaAI宣布合作後，有分析認為，博通長期以來主要承接不具備自主晶片設計能力的系統企業特用晶片（ASIC）訂單，如今將目標轉向能夠自行設計晶片的IC設計企業，可能引發半導體市場格局震盪。據韓媒ZDNet Korea引述業界消息，博通近期已向南韓代表性IC設計企業Furiosa

items.title: 宏捷科光通訊與客戶測試開發中　徐秀蘭揭2027顯著成績在望
items.summary: AI資料中心對高速傳輸要求日益提高，化合物半導體扮演關鍵角色，雖然基板材料仍面臨出口管制等短缺問題，但各家代工廠皆積極布局光通訊產品開發。砷化鎵（GaAs）晶圓代工廠宏捷科董事長徐秀蘭表示，光通訊為集團未來重要成長動能，目前已小量、實驗性光通訊產品，正與客戶進行測試和開發，預計2027年能看見顯著成績。徐秀蘭5月28日股東

items.title: 科技1分鐘：微電網（Microgrid）
items.summary: 微電網（Microgrid）是一套「局部、可被集中控制的電力系統」。它可將太陽能、儲能系統、備援發電、用電設備與能源管理系統整合在同一場域內，例如工廠、資料中心、園區、醫院或偏遠社區。根據美國能源部資料，微電網由明確邊界內的用電負載與分散式能源（DER）組成，平時可與大電網連接，必要時也能切換至孤島模式（islandmode）

items.title: 強攻OpenAI資料中心儲能商機　LGES奪DTE Energy 16億美元ESS大單
items.summary: 樂金能源解決方案（LGES）在北美能源儲存系統（ESS）市場再度拿下大規模供應合約，業界分析，在AI資料中心擴張與再生能源連結需求的雙重驅動下，北美ESS市場持續擴大，LGES因此得以繼2025年累計接單量達約140

items.title: NVIDIA越南積極徵才　工程師需密切與鴻海配合
items.summary: NVIDIA正擴大在越南的招募。從職缺來看，NVIDIA有意在越南組裝人工智慧（AI）伺服器產品。根據越南投資者報（The

items.title: AI晶片戰延伸至CPU　科技巨擘搶攻代理式AI新賽局
items.summary: 亞馬遜網路服務（AWS）最新獲得雲端資料倉儲業者Snowflake規模60億美元的人工智慧（AI）基礎設施合作案，擴大採用AWS自研Graviton CPU與AI算力，反映AI產業競爭正由GPU的大型語言模型（LLM）訓練戰，進一步延伸至CPU與自研晶片主導的代理式AI（Agentic

items.title: 光纖老牌藤倉搭上AI「雲霄飛車」　產能與原料供應成隱憂
items.summary: 光纖電纜製造商藤倉（Fujikura）是擁有141年歷史的老牌公司，在AI基礎建設的浪潮中，剛經歷了一場市值的暴漲與暴跌。彭博（Bloomberg）報導，在生成式AI需求激增的背景下，供應連接AI資料中心內部伺服器與交換器所需光纖電纜的藤倉，在過去2年內成為日本最炙手可熱的交易標的之一。藤倉也是負責建構美國資料中心基礎設施的樸

items.title: 華潤微跨足PLP先進封裝　卡位AI電源與800G光模組
items.summary: 隨著生成式AI、高效能運算（HPC）與大型資料中心需求快速升溫，半導體產業對晶片功耗、散熱與封裝密度的要求持續提高，先進封裝的重要性也同步攀升。其中，面板級封裝（Panel Level

items.title: 精材先靠外溢CP訂單拚轉型　2H26測試總產能攀升5成
items.summary: 台積電旗下封測廠精材召開股東常會，董事長陳家湘表示，展望半導體市況亮眼，2026年營運審慎樂觀，持續推進產品轉型布局，其中一大重點為擴大承接策略夥伴釋出的晶圓測試（CP）訂單，第3季測試總產能預計新增50%。值得注意的是，精材董事會日前通過新資本支出預算案，預計在第2季至2027年第3季期間，投入2

items.title: 圖表1分鐘：熱壓鍵合（TCB）與混合鍵合（HB）
items.summary: 先進封裝技術中，熱壓鍵合（Thermo-Compression Bonding；TCB）主要是透過熱與壓力實現晶片與基板之間金屬導點連接。與傳統焊錫接合相比，熱壓鍵合的接合強度、熱變形與訊號傳輸穩定性等較佳。近期記憶體大廠紛紛針對能提升頻寬、擴充容量的高頻寬快閃記憶體（High

items.title: 科技1分鐘：穿模通孔（TMV；Through Mold Via）
items.summary: 穿模通恐（TMV；Through Mold Via）是一種先進封裝中的垂直互連技術，主要用途是在封裝材料內建立導電通道，讓不同晶片或封裝層之間能高速傳輸訊號。其核心概念類似著名的TSV（Through Silicon Via，穿矽通孔），但差別在於TSV是直接在矽晶片內鑽孔，而TMV則是在封裝用的模封材料（Mold

items.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang hosts trillion-dollar dinner for Taiwan AI suppliers
items.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang hosted another "trillion-dollar dinner" at Juan Yau Restaurant in Taipei, Taiwan, on May 28, with chairmen and presidents from multiple Taiwanese artificial intelligence (AI) server and semiconductor supply chain companies attending and posing for group photos.

items.title: 黃仁勳示警台灣 AI 下一關卡，不是晶片、是電力
items.summary: AI 熱潮持續推升全球半導體與資料中心需求，不過 NVIDIA 執行長黃仁勳認為，卻將焦點指向另一項更關鍵的基 […]

items.title: 談華為「韜定律」，黃仁勳：是突破非威脅、台積電領先十年
items.summary: NVIDIA 執行長黃仁勳今日舉辦兆元宴，他在受訪時首度回應華為提出的半導體新定律「韜」（Tao），直言這對華 […]

items.title: Quantum Simulation Using Decision Diagrams. Innovation in Verification
items.summary: Quantum gate simulation complexity explodes as qubit counts increase. One way to manage this complexity in simulation on classical computers is through use of decision diagrams in place of matrices. Paul Cunningham (GM, Verification at Cadence), Raúl Camposano (Silicon Catalyst, entrepreneur, former Synopsys CTO and lecturer… Read More

items.title: 擷發科 COMPUTEX 2026 聚焦邊緣 AI，首亮相 AI 載具系統事業群
items.summary: ASIC 設計服務的擷發科將在 COMPUTEX 2026 首度公開「AI 載具系統事業群」，正式布局車載邊緣 […]

items.title: 黃仁勳兆元宴大咖雲集，台 AI 供應鏈重量級掌門人齊聚
items.summary: Nvidia 執行長黃仁勳在台行程今日來到萬眾注目的兆元宴，一如以往，今天的宴請供應鏈名單從晶圓代工、電子代工 […]

items.title: AI 時代的煉金術師！衛司特切進 CoWoS、HDI 板金屬回收市場
items.summary: AI 伺服器帶動高階 PCB、HDI 高密度連接板與 CoWoS 先進封裝需求升溫，也讓 ESG 與電子廢液循 […]

items.title: Iteq sees AI data center demand lift M7+ CCL shipments
items.summary: Copper clad laminate (CCL) maker Iteq held its 2026 annual general meeting on Thursday, with Chairman Dennis Chen saying that the continued deepening of generative AI applications, faster cloud computing and data center expansion, and steady growth in demand from new energy-related industries are boosting demand for high-end electronic materials and high-frequency, high-speed printed circuit board (PCB) markets.

items.title: FuriosaAI and Broadcom partner on AI inference platform for agentic computing era
items.summary: South Korean AI chip startup FuriosaAI has announced a partnership with Broadcom to develop a next-generation AI inference platform aimed at large-scale agentic AI deployments, as demand grows for infrastructure optimized for AI reasoning and high-volume inference workloads.

items.title: Taiwan's Tmytek files for public listing, pushes millimeter-wave chips into satellites, defense, and 6G
items.summary: Tmytek, a Taiwan-based specialist in millimeter-wave phased-array technology, has formally filed for listing on Taiwan's Innovation Board — a tech-focused public market for high-growth companies — becoming the first applicant for the exchange's 2026 intake. The move comes as the company pursues a broad expansion into satellite communications, defense systems, and next-generation wireless infrastructure.

items.title: ASE launches first automated PLP line, eyes 1H27 production
items.summary: Advanced Semiconductor Engineering (ASE) has unveiled its industry-first automated panel-level packaging (PLP) system, a development poised to reshape global artificial intelligence (AI) and high-performance computing supply chains by significantly improving chip integration speeds and manufacturing efficiency for AI data centers and cloud infrastructure providers.

items.title: Taiwan's Thunder Tiger rejects China supply chain claims, advances to Phase II of US Drone Dominance Program
items.summary: Taiwanese drone manufacturer Thunder Tiger, the first company in Asia to obtain the US Department of Defense's (DoD) Blue UAS cybersecurity certification, has passed the first phase of evaluation for the US Drone Dominance Program (DDP) and has moved into the second phase.

items.title: Amazon and Snowflake expand alliance amid agentic AI race
items.summary: Snowflake, the cloud data company at the center of the artificial intelligence boom, said on Wednesday that it would spend US$6 billion over the next five years on Amazon Web Services infrastructure, deepening a partnership aimed at helping corporations move from experimental AI projects to large-scale deployment of autonomous software agents.

items.title: 新思調高年度財測  CEO：自研資料中心晶片成趨勢
items.summary: 美國電子設計自動化（EDA）軟體商新思科技（Synopsys）決定調高年度財測，暗示爭相開發 AI 晶片與基礎 […]

items.title: Salesforce Taiwan targets double-digit growth on AI applications and services
items.summary: Since opening its Taipei office in January 2026, customer relationship management (CRM) technology firm Salesforce has continued to expand its Taiwan-based team, shifting from remote support via its Singapore subsidiary to local operations. According to Salesforce Taiwan general manager Chia-shen Hsu, the company is aiming for double-digit growth in both revenue and headcount in 2026, as it devotes more resources toward the market in Taiwan.

items.title: AI 資料中心掀電力建設潮，安葆在手訂單破 120 億元
items.summary: 安葆受惠半導體、AI 資料中心等關鍵基礎設施建置需求持續升溫，公司內部統計，截至 2026 年第一季，在手訂單 […]

items.title: Apple's entry-level push puts pressure on Windows notebook makers
items.summary: Apple's introduction of the MacBook Neo has intensified competition in the low-end notebook market, putting pressure on Windows-based manufacturers across both education and consumer segments, according to industry executives and analysts.

items.title: Google 印度維薩喀巴坦大蓋 AI 資料中心，卻面臨缺水及徵收土地爭議
items.summary: 印度維薩喀巴坦（Visakhapatnam）剛成為全球 AI 基礎設施的新焦點，但這場投資熱潮也引發當地水資源 […]

items.title: 一個三星多個世界！績效獎金引爆內部矛盾，韓媒憂心跨部門合作難再實現
items.summary: 根據韓國朝鮮日報報導，三星電子勞資雙方雖然在總罷工前夕戲劇性地達成了暫定協議，成功化解罷工危機，並且完成了投票 […]

items.title: 英特爾發表先進封裝 EMIB-T，直供電助力大型 AI 處理器
items.summary: 半導體大廠英特爾 (Intel) 旗下的晶圓代工 （Foundry） 業務近日正式公開其最新一代的嵌入式多晶片 […]

items.title: Solidigm appoints co-CEOs to split operations and growth responsibilities
items.summary: Solidigm, the enterprise storage brand under SK Hynix, announced a leadership reshuffle this spring, naming two executives as co-chief executive officers to divide responsibilities between global operations and commercial growth. One co-CEO was appointed in March 2026, and the other took office on May 1, with leadership stating the change aims to accelerate product execution and business performance amid rising demand for storage driven by artificial intelligence.

items.title: SK Hynix turns Big Tech's memory scramble into tougher supply terms
items.summary: SK Hynix is using Big Tech's rush to secure artificial intelligence (AI) memory supply as leverage for tougher long-term contracts, while resisting funding structures that could give major customers influence over its fabs or equipment.

items.title: TECO targets AI data center market with modular, North America and Southeast Asia push
items.summary: TECO Electric & Machinery said it is making AI data center infrastructure its main growth focus, with expansion plans in North America and Southeast Asia that could affect global supply chains, energy systems, and digital infrastructure. The company is leaning on modular construction, power equipment, and energy management to win more hyperscale projects.

items.title: Nvidia's Rubin CPX plans clouded as Groq gains bigger inference role
items.summary: Nvidia's plan to launch Rubin CPX, an inference-focused graphics processing unit for its Vera Rubin platform, has become increasingly uncertain as supply-chain activity around the product appears to have stalled, according to The Elec.

items.title: Commentary: China's AI chip certification becomes new market gatekeeper
items.summary: China has brought AI chips into its national security and reliability evaluation framework for the first time, turning what looks like a product certification process into something more consequential: an emerging gatekeeping system for AI computing infrastructure.

items.title: Synopsys sees agentic AI and Ansys integration expanding long-term growth opportunities
items.summary: Synopsys said the rise of agentic artificial intelligence and the integration of Ansys are creating new growth opportunities across electronic design automation (EDA) and simulation software, as semiconductor and industrial customers adopt more complex AI-driven engineering workflows.

items.title: China smartphone shipments rebound in April 2026 as Apple and foreign brands gain ground
items.summary: China's smartphone market showed signs of stabilization in April 2026, with both overall handset shipments and smartphone shipments returning to year-over-year growth, according to new figures released by the China Academy of Information and Communications Technology (CAICT).

items.title: Engineering the Next Era of Semiconductor Innovation
items.summary:
The semiconductor industry is entering a transformative new phase, driven by the convergence of artificial intelligence, cloud computing, and increasingly complex chip architectures. That message took center stage during the keynote talks at the Siemens EDA User2User 2026 North America conference. Executives from Siemens,… Read More

The post
